item.title: TheIrishField: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 8min Last year's record highs felt a distant memory, as the average, turnover and clear
item.description: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 8min Last year's record highs felt a distant memory, as the average, turnover and clearance rate fell significantly, Amy Lynam reports from Newmarket De theirishfield.ie 209

Sam Russell @Russkit26 · 10 abr. @PatrickKennelly PK i’m sure you’ve had this a thousand times already, but just in case. Just caught the pod with @CobdenHarry and Robson Green Fishing and Robson & Jerome, is the same person!!! Mental!! 2 1 351
